questions.text: Explain the preamble of Indian Constitution.

Give the duties of Attorney General.
Write five specialities of Supreme court.
Explain Writ Jurisdiction.
Explain the role of Governor.
What is the procedure for amending the Constitution?
Why administrative tribunals are established?
Define Constitution of India with comparison with other countries.
Discuss the term Union and its Territory.
Explain the term citizenship and its types.
How Indian Citizenship can be acquired?
Explain the term fundamental rights and its classification.
Explain right against exploitation and right to constitutional remedies.
What do you mean by Directive principles of state policy?
What are the fundamental duties of an Indian citizen?
Explain how Union Executive is elected and formed.
What are the different functions of Parliament?
Differentiate Rajya Sabha and Lok Sabha with five points.
How can a citizen be qualified and disqualified as an MP?
Differentiate State Government and Union Territory.
Explain State Legislative Assembly in detail.
Discuss about Jurisdiction of High court.
Explain State Legislative Council in detail
How is Central and State Government related on economic basis?
Explain how the constitution handles an emergency situation in the country.
Which are the functions of Comptroller and Auditor General of India?
Explain the role of Public Service Commission.
